role_summary: the corporate governance manager ensures effective governance practices, board  compliance, and ethical standards within the organization.
responsibilities: • ensure compliance with corporate governance requirements   • support board and committee operations   • monitor adherence to companies act and sebi regulations   • develop governance policies and frameworks   • coordinate board reporting and disclosu res  • advise management on governance best practices
qualifications: • ca with strong governance and compliance experience   • knowledge of corporate laws and regulations   • strong coordination and communication skills
